text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The URA Finale comes to a close as a great
success.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The sight of the competitors racing to claim the
crown has touched the hearts of everyone in
attendance.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Director Akikawa takes the opportunity to
express her deep gratitude, as well as to regale
me with a passionate speech!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Director Akikawa takes the opportunity to
express her deep gratitude!
